title: TransIndia Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TransIndia Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TransIndia Logistics family as a Warehouse Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TransIndia Logistics:
TransIndia Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TransIndia Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
